chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2023 of 2010 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 28-03-2025 Mr. M. Usman Alam, advocate holds brief for Mr. Anwar Kashif Mumtaz, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the respondent Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. This petition is pending since 2010 without any significant progress. Even today, fifteen years later, brief is being held for petitioner’s counsel and adjournment is being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
